key.name: enabled
key.description: Whether scanning input for adaptive switches is active. Off by default.

key.name: mode
key.description: Item scan steps through on-screen controls; point scan moves a crosshair.

key.name: scanning
key.description: Auto advances on a timer; step advances on each switch press.

key.name: auto-interval-ms
key.description: How long each item is highlighted before auto-scan advances.

key.name: dwell-ms
key.description: How long to rest before a dwell selection fires.

key.name: debounce-ms
key.description: Ignore repeated switch presses within this window.
